nasb.text: So it shall serve as a sign on your hand and as phylacteries on your forehead, for with a powerful hand the Lord brought us out of Egypt.”

esv.text: It shall be as a mark on your hand or frontlets between your eyes, for by a strong hand the Lord brought us out of Egypt.”

cnv.text: 這要在你的手上作記號，在你的額上作頭帶；因為耶和華曾用大能的手把我們從埃及領出來。’”

ccb.text: 这事就像在你们手上作记号，额上作标记，以牢记耶和华曾用大能的手领我们离开埃及。”
